now.summary: Resuming the broader EA/operator setup across organization, integrations, and visibility now that the dashboard connection issue has been resolved outside this session.

items.title: Re-enable Control UI device auth / remove dangerous dashboard flag

recentCompletions.title: Dashboard lane stabilized

decisionQueue.title: Re-enable Control UI device auth / remove dangerous dashboard flag
decisionQueue.summary: Improve dashboard security by removing the break-glass device-auth override.

decisionQueue.title: Decide whether Telegram group messages should stay blocked or get an explicit allowlist
decisionQueue.summary: Keep groups blocked by default or enable a small trusted allowlist if group participation is actually wanted.

decisionQueue.title: Decide later which home folders should become symlinks
decisionQueue.summary: Hold symlink decisions until basic file migration is stable.
